throw_rock.name: Throw Rock
throw_rock.description: Throw a rock dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] physical damage and stunning for {stunDuration} turn(s)

holy_smite.name: Holy Smite
holy_smite.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magic damage to enemy and heal lowest HP ally for {healPercent} of damage dealt

divine_light.name: Divine Light
divine_light.description: Heal target ally for [{base} + {attack} + {int}] HP and remove up to 3 debuffs. If ally is at full HP, grants shield for half the heal amount and Immune for 1 turn

sanctuary.name: Sanctuary
sanctuary.description: All allies gain Increase Defense and Increase Attack for {duration} turns and cleanse one random debuff

mass_heal.name: Mass Heal
mass_heal.description: Heal all allies for [{base} + {attack} + {int}] HP and grant Immune for 2 turns

hierophant_male_passive.name: Divine Retribution
hierophant_male_passive.description: Divine Light causes healing target to attack random enemy

hierophant_female_passive.name: Sanctuary Momentum
hierophant_female_passive.description: Sanctuary increases all allies' action bar by {actionBarGrant}

prophet_male_passive.name: Divine Spillover
prophet_male_passive.description: Overhealing spreads to the next lowest HP ally ({spilloverPercent} effectiveness)

prophetess_female_passive.name: Mass Momentum
prophetess_female_passive.description: When casting Mass Heal, {actionBarChance} chance to gain {actionBarGain} action bar

aimed_shot.name: Aimed Shot
aimed_shot.description: High damage shot dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage, ignores 25% armor and breaks shields

hunters_mark.name: Hunter's Mark
hunters_mark.description: Apply Mark and Blight debuff to target for {duration} turns

double_shot.name: Double Shot
double_shot.description: Fire twice: first shot applies Reduce Defense, second shot hits random enemy and applies Bleed

rain_of_arrows.name: Rain of Arrows
rain_of_arrows.description: AOE damage dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] + {debuffBonus} per debuff on enemies

sniper_male_passive.name: Executioner
sniper_male_passive.description: Deal 150% damage to enemies below 30% HP

sniper_female_passive.name: Kill Rush
sniper_female_passive.description: Killing an enemy grants Increase Speed buff for 2 turns

monster_hunter_male_passive.name: Bleeding Shot
monster_hunter_male_passive.description: Aimed Shot applies Bleed for 1 turn

monster_hunter_female_passive.name: Exploit Weakness
monster_hunter_female_passive.description: Gain 5% action bar per debuff on Aimed Shot target

natures_blessing.name: Nature's Blessing
natures_blessing.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magic damage to enemy and grant 10% action bar to lowest HP ally

barkskin.name: Barkskin
barkskin.description: Target ally gains Increase Defense for {duration} turns, heals {healPercent}% HP, and gains {shieldPercent}% max HP shield

primal_roar.name: Primal Roar
primal_roar.description: AOE damage dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage and apply Reduce Attack for {duration} turns

natures_balance.name: Nature's Balance
natures_balance.description: Remove all debuffs from allies and heal {healAmount}, while removing all buffs from enemies and dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] damage

runemaster_male_passive.name: Intimidating Roar
runemaster_male_passive.description: Primal Roar taunts all enemies for 1 turn

runemaster_female_passive.name: Nature's Revenge
runemaster_female_passive.description: When taking magical damage, retaliate with Nature's Blessing without using action bar

summoner_male_passive.name: Draining Blessing
summoner_male_passive.description: Nature's Blessing lowers action bar of lowest HP enemy by 5%

summoner_female_passive.name: Healing Blessing
summoner_female_passive.description: Nature's Blessing heals lowest HP ally for {healPercent} HP

arcane_missiles.name: Arcane Missiles
arcane_missiles.description: Hit target for [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magic damage, plus 1 hit to each debuffed enemy

frost_armor.name: Frost Armor
frost_armor.description: Apply Frost Armor buff for {duration} turns (25% damage reduction, attackers are slowed)

twilights_promise.name: Twilight's Promise

white_witch_female_passive.name: Hastening Cleanse

arch_sage_male_passive.description: When receiving a debuff, also gain Increase Attack buff

arch_sage_female_passive.name: Swift Adaptation
arch_sage_female_passive.description: When receiving a debuff, also gain Increase Speed buff

blade_strike.name: Blade Strike
blade_strike.description: Physical attack dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] damage, {bleedBonus} damage if target is bleeding

shield_bash.name: Shield Bash
shield_bash.description: Taunt target for {tauntDuration} turn and gain {shieldAmount} shield

rally_banner.name: Rally Banner
rally_banner.description: Taunt all enemies, allies gain Increase Attack for {duration} turn and {actionBarGrant} action bar

blood_pact.name: Blood Pact

champion_male_passive.description: When hit by physical or magical attack, 20% chance to stun attacker

champion_female_passive.name: Regenerating Shield

avenger_male_passive.name: Blighting Vengeance
avenger_male_passive.description: When attacked by a taunted unit, that unit receives Blight debuff for {blightDuration} turns

avenger_female_passive.name: Reactive Speed
avenger_female_passive.description: Gain {actionBarGain} action bar when taking damage

psi_strike.name: Psi Strike
psi_strike.description: If enemy ≥30% action bar: [{base} + {attack} + {int}] physical damage and drain {actionBarDrain} action bar. If <30%: pure damage

psychic_mark.name: Psychic Mark
psychic_mark.description: Apply Mark and Reduce Speed debuff to target for {duration} turns

void_strike.description: Hit enemy with Psi Strike once per debuff on target

psi_shift.name: Psi Shift

dark_arch_templar_female_passive.name: Blighting Mark

grand_templar_female_passive.name: Complete Drain

cheap_shot.name: Cheap Shot
cheap_shot.description: Transfer 1 random debuff from self to target, deal [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage

cripple.name: Cripple
cripple.description: Apply Reduce Speed, Reduce Attack, and Bleed for {duration} turns

assassinate.name: Assassinate
assassinate.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] pure damage if enemy is below {hpThreshold} HP and has a debuff

shadowstep.description: Apply Taunt, Mark, and Bleed to target for {duration} turns

phantom_assassin_female_passive.name: Lethal Opportunity

master_stalker_male_passive.description: {dodgePure} dodge pure, {dodgeMagical} magical, {dodgePhysical} physical. Cheap Shot adds Bleed

master_stalker_female_passive.name: Mystical Evasion
master_stalker_female_passive.description: {dodgePure} dodge pure, {dodgePhysical} physical, {dodgeMagical} magical. Cheap Shot adds Bleed

purge_slash.name: Purge Slash
purge_slash.description: Deal [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage and remove {buffsToRemove} buffs from enemy

nullblade_cleave.name: Nullblade Cleave
nullblade_cleave.description: AOE damage dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] + {buffBonus} per buff on enemies

steal_magic.name: Steal Magic
steal_magic.description: Transfer all buffs from enemy to random allies. Unbuffed enemies receive Reduce Defense for {duration} turns

hex.name: Hex

grand_inquisitor_female_passive.name: Complete Purge

slash.name: Slash
slash.description: Deals {percent} of target's max HP or {cap} damage, whichever is lower

bite.description: Deals {percent} of target's max HP or {floor} damage, whichever is higher

corrupt_blessing.description: All enemies gain one random buff and Mark debuff, all allies gain one random buff

divine_plague.name: Divine Plague
divine_plague.description: Holy corruption dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage, apply Blight and Silence for {duration} turns

toxic_slam.name: Toxic Slam
toxic_slam.description: Putrid slam dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage to all, apply {bleedStacks} Bleed stacks

epidemic_burst.name: Epidemic Burst
epidemic_burst.description: Plague explosion dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage +{bonusDamage} per total debuffs on enemies

consume_corruption.name: Consume Corruption
consume_corruption.description: Remove all debuffs, gain massive Shield and Increase Attack/Speed for {duration} turns

plague_nova.name: Plague Nova
plague_nova.description: Disease wave dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage to all, stun enemies with Blight for {stunDuration} turn

living_disease_passive.name: Living Disease
living_disease_passive.description: Apply one random debuff to random enemy every turn

mirror_strike.name: Mirror Strike
mirror_strike.description: Physical damage dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] damage, creates 5% HP shield on allies with no debuffs

false_image.name: False Image
false_image.description: Grants self Frost Armor and Increase Defense for {duration} turns

deceptive_guard.name: Deceptive Guard
deceptive_guard.description: Taunt all enemies for 1 turn, heal self 10% HP, grant 10% HP shield to all allies

illusion_bolt.name: Illusion Bolt
illusion_bolt.description: Magical bolt dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] damage, grants random ally Immune

veil_of_deception.name: Veil of Deception
veil_of_deception.description: All allies heal 10% HP, gain Immune and Increase Speed for {duration} turn

reality_blur.name: Reality Blur
reality_blur.description: Remove all debuffs from allies and grant 20% HP shield

phantom_strike.name: Phantom Strike
phantom_strike.description: Physical strike dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] damage, steals 1 buff

smoke_and_daggers.name: Smoke and Daggers
smoke_and_daggers.description: Apply Mark and Reduce Speed to target for {duration} turns

illusory_double.name: Illusory Double
illusory_double.description: All debuffs on self are applied to random enemies, then cleansed

nightmare_touch.name: Nightmare Touch
nightmare_touch.description: Dark touch dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage, drains 10% action bar

sleep_paralysis.name: Sleep Paralysis
sleep_paralysis.description: Stun target for 1 turn if they have less than 50% action bar

dream_feast.name: Dream Feast
dream_feast.description: Drain 20% action bar from all enemies, heal allies based on drain (max 30% HP)

mirror_blade.name: Mirror Blade
mirror_blade.description: Physical strike dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] damage, double if sharing buffs with target

perfect_copy.name: Perfect Copy
perfect_copy.description: Copy all buffs from target enemy to self

shattered_reflection.name: Shattered Reflection
shattered_reflection.description: On death, all allies gain Immune for 1 turn

shell_slam.name: Shell Slam
shell_slam.description: Heavy slam dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage, 30% stun chance

fortress_shell.name: Fortress Shell
fortress_shell.description: Grant self massive shield (50% max HP) and Increase Defense for {duration} turns

tsunami.name: Tsunami
tsunami.description: Halve all enemy action bars, deal [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage to all

ancient_shell.name: Ancient Shell
ancient_shell.description: Gains Frost Armor for 3 turns when created

phantom_blade.name: Phantom Blade
phantom_blade.description: Hybrid strike dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] damage based on lower defense

perfect_illusion.name: Perfect Illusion
perfect_illusion.description: Remove all debuffs, gain Increase Speed and Frost Armor for {duration} turns

shimmering_assault.name: Shimmering Assault
shimmering_assault.description: Attack all enemies for [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] damage, steal 1 buff from each

mirror_of_truth.name: Mirror of Truth
mirror_of_truth.description: Each turn, copy all unique buffs from enemy team (unless stunned/silenced/taunted)

lightning_breath.name: Lightning Breath
lightning_breath.description: Electric breath dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage to all enemies with {stunChance}% chance to Stun for {stunDuration} turn

storm_shield.name: Storm Shield
storm_shield.description: Grant all allies a {shieldAmount} HP Shield

eye_of_the_storm.name: Eye of the Storm
eye_of_the_storm.description: When damaged, grants random ally Increase Speed for {duration} turns

shadow_flame.name: Shadow Flame
shadow_flame.description: Dark flames dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and applying Mark and Blight for {duration} turns

corrupting_darkness.name: Corrupting Darkness
corrupting_darkness.description: Shadow wave silencing all enemies for {silenceDuration} turn

shadow_veil.name: Shadow Veil
shadow_veil.description: Attacks have {markChance}% chance to apply Mark for {markDuration} turn

scorching_breath.name: Scorching Breath
scorching_breath.description: Fiery breath dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage to all enemies and applying Bleed for {bleedDuration} turns

inferno_wave.name: Inferno Wave
inferno_wave.description: Devastating fire wave dealing [{base} + {attack} + {str}] physical damage to all enemies, +50% damage to bleeding targets

burning_fury.name: Burning Fury
burning_fury.description: Gains Increase Attack for {duration} turns when any unit has Bleed

frost_breath_dragon.name: Frost Breath
frost_breath_dragon.description: Icy breath dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage to all enemies, applying Reduce Speed and Reduce Attack for {duration} turns

glacial_barrier.name: Glacial Barrier
glacial_barrier.description: Grant Frost Armor to all allies for {duration} turns

frozen_heart.name: Frozen Heart
frozen_heart.description: All magical damage is halved, gain Increase Defense for {duration} turns when hit with magical damage

elemental_devastation.name: Elemental Devastation
elemental_devastation.description: Catastrophic AOE dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage + {debuffBonus} per debuff on targets

regenerating_heads.name: Regenerating Heads
regenerating_heads.description: When below {hpThreshold}% HP, fully heal and cleanse all debuffs (once per battle)

hydras_command.name: Hydra's Command
hydras_command.description: After Hydra's turn, random ally attacks with their first spell

swift_strike.name: Swift Strike
swift_strike.description: Quick attack dealing [{base} + {attack} + {agi}] physical damage and granting Increase Speed for {duration} turns

aerial_support.name: Aerial Support
aerial_support.description: Grant all allies Increase Speed for {duration} turns and heal lowest HP ally for {healPercent}% max HP

purifying_flame.name: Purifying Flame
purifying_flame.description: Small flame dealing [{base} + {attack} + {int}] magical damage and removing 1 buff from target

win.name: Win
win.description: [{base}] Pure Damage and gain Increase Speed for {duration} turns

increase_attack_test.name: Increase Attack Test
increase_attack_test.description: Grants Increase Attack buff for {duration} turns

increase_speed_test.name: Increase Speed Test
increase_speed_test.description: Grants Increase Speed buff for {duration} turns

increase_defense_test.name: Increase Defense Test
increase_defense_test.description: Grants Increase Defense buff for {duration} turns

shield_test.name: Shield Test
shield_test.description: Grants Shield buff that absorbs {shieldAmount} damage

frost_armor_test.name: Frost Armor Test
frost_armor_test.description: Grants Frost Armor buff for {duration} turns (25% damage reduction, attackers are slowed)

reduce_attack_test.name: Reduce Attack Test
reduce_attack_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Attack debuff for {duration} turns

reduce_speed_test.name: Reduce Speed Test
reduce_speed_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Speed debuff for {duration} turns

reduce_defense_test.name: Reduce Defense Test
reduce_defense_test.description: Inflicts Reduce Defense debuff for {duration} turns

taunt_test.name: Taunt Test
taunt_test.description: Forces enemy to attack this unit for {duration} turns
